name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard mutual NDA created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, used to capture the specific business terms before incorporating the standard terms by reference.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard cloud service agreement (CSA) for SaaS and cloud-hosted software, covering subscription terms, data handling, liability, and support obligations.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Standard service level agreement (SLA) defining uptime commitments, incident response times, and remedies for service failures.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard design partner agreement for early-stage product collaborations, covering feedback obligations, IP ownership, and confidentiality.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Standard professional services agreement (PSA) for statement-of-work engagements, covering deliverables, payment terms, IP assignment, and warranties.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Standard data processing agreement (DPA) for GDPR and privacy-law compliance, covering data controller/processor obligations, security measures, and sub-processor requirements.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard partnership agreement for technology reseller, referral, and co-sell relationships, covering revenue share, obligations, and IP rights.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard software license agreement for on-premise and perpetual software, covering license grants, restrictions, maintenance, and liability.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Standard short-term pilot or trial agreement allowing a prospective customer to evaluate a product or service before committing to a full commercial contract.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Standard HIPAA business associate agreement (BAA) for covered entities and business associates handling protected health information (PHI).

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard AI addendum to be used alongside a Cloud Service Agreement or Software License Agreement, covering AI-specific terms such as model training restrictions, output ownership, and accuracy disclaimers.
